ratings.comment: I am just not a fan of how the class is structured. There is readings before every lecture and most lectures are just discussing these readings and It gets very boring and dull. He also never gave us any direction for the first group project and just expected us to be on top of it without even explaining or introducing the project in class.

Professor Dwight is a great professor and lecturer. He is very helpful during office hours. Be prepared to do a lot of reading from the assigned book. There are no exams, but a few group presentations.
